sum-to-ten-point-costs.description: Point costs for each priority level in Sum to Ten generation

priority-table.description: Priority Table for Sum to Ten (identical to SR5 core p.65)

metatype-cost-table.description: Karma cost to purchase metatype in Point Buy and Life Modules systems

point-buy-magic-qualities.description: Karma costs to gain Magic or Resonance in Point Buy system

rows.notes: Free power points equal to Magic Rating. Can buy more Magic ranks with Karma.
Skilled in one area: Sorcery, Conjuring, or Enchanting. Can buy more Magic ranks.
Full spellcasting, conjuring, other magical abilities. Can buy more Magic ranks.
No free power points. Buy power points at 5 Karma each, max equal to Magic Rating.
Can buy more Resonance ranks with Karma.

nationalities.description: Nationality modules for Life Modules system. Each costs 15 Karma.

real-life.description: Real Life modules (~4 years each). Each costs 100 Karma. Multiple may be taken but not the same one twice. Skills cannot exceed 7 from modules.

rows.name: Bounty Hunter
rows.skills: Athletics skill group +1, Close Combat skill group +1, First Aid +1, Intimidation +1, Longarms +1, Perception +1, Pistols +1, Survival +1, Tracking +1, Street Knowledge: Lone Star Procedures +3, Street Knowledge: Crook Hangouts +3

rows.name: Celebrity
rows.skills: Con +1, Escape Artist +1, +6 to buy any skills appropriate to field of celebrity (no more than 3 ranks in any individual skill; ranks in Con and Escape Artist may be purchased with these points), Professional Knowledge: [Sports/Music/Film] +3
rows.notes: Also +1 to two attributes of choice (must be two separate attributes, other than Charisma)

rows.name: Combat Correspondent
rows.skills: Electronics skill group +2, Navigation +1, Negotiation +2, Perception +2, Survival +1, Professional Knowledge: Journalism +5, Language: [Any] +3, Language: [Any] +1

jobs.skills: Cracking skill group +2, Electronics skill group +3, First Aid +2, Academic Knowledge: Physics +3, Professional Knowledge: Matrix Security Design +6

jobs.name: Security Rigger

specializations.name: Cyber Division

rows.skills: Instruction +2, +10 to skills from your education module (no more than 4 added to any one skill), Academic Knowledge: [Major] +2, Academic Knowledge: [Any] +2

tours-of-duty.description: Military Tour of Duty modules. Each represents a 5-year commitment. Costs 100 Karma each (same as Real Life). Rank 5+ = NCO, Rank 20+ = Officer.

rows.name: Tour of Duty: Mercenary
rows.basicTraining: Firearms skill group +1, First Aid +1, Navigation +1, Professional Knowledge: Foreign Military +3
